title: Brutal Nightmare Config Integration
description: Add config menu for Brutal Nightmare
body:
> Add global config menu for [Brutal Nightmare](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare)
---
**NOTES! YOU MUST RESTART THE WORLD AFTER CHANGING THE SETTINGS THROUGH THIS**

---
**Support**
+ Forge, Fabric, Quilt (`1.16-1.25`)
+ For [Brutal Nightmare](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Version `4.6+`

**Features**
+ Add menu config screen for [Brutal Nightmare](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) and global config world
> `Cloth Config API` is required! `FabricAPI` and `ModMenu` is also REQUIRED in Fabric and Quilt Edition
